item.title: This CapCut template features an AI baby completely freaking out and going full chaos mode while doing the viral “67” brainrot dance, with animation by @goofglitch. The “67” meme is a massive TikTok trend from 2025 that’s known for having no real meaning

item.title: @chickennoodle266’s animation of Tung Tung Tung Sahur doing a @71cent dance to Cradles by Sub Urban is pure brainrot meme energy in the best way. It takes the instantly recognizable Tung Tung Tung Sahur character, adds a viral dance feel, and pairs it wit
